metadata.purpose: Onboard new clients across all business segments, from initial inquiry through account activation

process_steps.name: Client Inquiry Received
process_steps.description: Initial client inquiry is received and logged in the CRM. Relationship Manager captures basic client information and intent.

process_steps.name: Collect Client Documentation
process_steps.description: Required onboarding documents are requested from the client and uploaded to the Document Portal.

process_steps.name: Verify Identity Documents
process_steps.description: Identity documents are verified against external databases using the ID Verification System. Document authenticity and validity are checked.

process_steps.name: KYC/AML Screening
process_steps.description: Client is screened against sanctions lists, PEP databases, and adverse media. KYC risk profile is generated.

process_steps.name: Risk Assessment & Categorization
process_steps.description: Client risk category is assigned based on KYC screening results, business type, geography, and product complexity.

process_steps.name: Account Setup & Configuration
process_steps.description: Client account is created in the Core Banking System with appropriate product configuration, limits, and access rights.

process_steps.name: Welcome Pack & Access Provisioning
process_steps.description: Client receives welcome documentation, login credentials, and access to digital banking channels is provisioned.
process_steps.output: Welcome pack sent, access credentials provisioned

process_steps.name: Account Activation & Go-Live
process_steps.description: Relationship Manager confirms client readiness, activates the account, and logs go-live in CRM.

controls.title: Identity Verification Check
controls.description: Identity documents verified against external databases before proceeding

controls.title: KYC/AML Screening Gate
controls.description: Client must pass KYC/AML screening before account can be created

controls.title: Risk Categorization Approval
controls.description: Risk category assignment reviewed — high-risk clients require senior approval

systems.name: Salesforce CRM
systems.purpose: Client relationship management, inquiry tracking, onboarding status

systems.name: Document Portal
systems.purpose: Secure document upload, storage, and retrieval for client onboarding documents

systems.name: ID Verification System
systems.purpose: Third-party identity verification against government databases and watchlists

systems.name: KYC Platform
systems.purpose: KYC/AML screening, sanctions checking, PEP screening, risk profiling

systems.name: Core Banking System
systems.purpose: Account creation, configuration, product setup, and activation

discrepancies.description: Duration, wait time, and channel fields are missing for all 8 process steps — flowchart did not include timing data
Flowchart shows KYC fail path and Enhanced Due Diligence branch but no exception details were provided — EX# items needed
No pain points captured — flowchart does not surface pain points (expected from SME interview)
Control evidence fields are empty for all 3 controls — need to capture what artifact proves each control executed
